messages.content:

Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

message.content: This section serves as a heading for a ranked list of Chinese mobile games ordered by download volume. It is structured to answer retrieval questions regarding: **Topics** (Chinese mobile game market popularity and user acquisition performance); **Entities** (specific mobile game titles, though none are provided in the excerpt); **Metrics** (download volume/counts used to establish the ranking); **Evidence Types** (implied leaderboard, table, or figure presenting quantitative performance data); and **Claims** (implicit assertions about which games lead the Chinese market in downloads). The provided text contains only the section title, so specific game names, exact download figures, timeframes, ranking criteria, definitions, and procedural details are not available. It functions as a header for a data-driven market performance ranking.
